metaData.Key Information: Packed with vitamins A, B3, C, D3 and E, every sip is a essential burst of multivitamin health. Made from real Kyoho Grapes, hailed as king of grapes, it has a sweeter taste and more distinct flavour as compared to other grapes. It also contains no preservatives nor artificial colouring for a guilt-free consumption.
